description: Eval set for OWASP ZAP container-based web application DAST scanning skill

evals.prompt: We just deployed our web app to https://staging.example.com. Can you run a quick baseline security scan against it and generate an HTML report? Something safe that won't damage anything.
evals.expected_output: Runs zap-baseline.py against target URL with --network host, generates HTML report. Confirms passive-only, safe for CI/CD.

evals.prompt: We have a REST API with an OpenAPI spec at https://api.example.com/openapi.json. Can you scan the API for security vulnerabilities?
evals.expected_output: Runs zap-api-scan.py with -f openapi against the OpenAPI URL, generates report. API-specific active scan.

evals.prompt: Our internal staging app runs on localhost:3000 in a podman container. I want to run a thorough active scan against it before release.
evals.expected_output: Runs zap-full-scan.py with --network host against http://localhost:3000. Warns about active scan being potentially destructive.

evals.prompt: We need to fail our CI pipeline if certain security headers are missing from our web app. Can you set up a ZAP baseline scan with a config file that makes missing headers a FAIL?
evals.expected_output: Generates ZAP config file with relevant rules set to FAIL (10010, 10011, 10020, 10021), runs baseline scan with -c config_file. Explains exit code 1 behavior.
